title: campanula glomerata subsp. caucasica
intro: Campanula glomerata subsp. caucasica, also known as Caucasus bellflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation due to its astringent and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Campanula glomerata subsp. caucasica include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
